response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, fluent asserts), and proven leadership through workshops and open-source projects, but lacks explicit evidence of people management and organizational change leadership required for this role, and mobile platform experience is only implied through iOS app maintenance.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven technical leadership via open-source projects and workshops that upskill teams
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and systems programming with performance optimization skills
concerns: No clear documentation of formal people management or team leadership responsibilities
Mobile platform experience limited to one iOS project; lacks depth in modern mobile ecosystems
No evidence of strategic roadmap ownership or organizational change initiatives beyond technical contributions
